items.claim: Melissano performed poorly in The Ultimate Fighter, appearing as a punching bag.
items.quote: She just looked awful in The Ultimate Fighter. She looked like a punching bag out there.
her ground game just looks non-existent.

items.claim: Barbosa is a legitimate black belt in BJJ.
items.quote: Barbosa is is a is a legit black belt in BJJ.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has been hurt, knocked down, or knocked out in each of his last five fights.
items.quote: He's taken a ton of damage throughout his career, especially these last five fights. You go back and watch his last five fights and he's either getting knocked down, knocked out, or hurt in those last five fights.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is not a wrestler.
items.quote: Jared Cannonier is not a wrestler at all
He's been talking about the bad knees for years now

items.claim: Kamaru Usman lacks a submission threat.
